global_description: A small, compact seabird with a rounded body and short neck. It has a predominantly dark gray plumage with white underparts. The bird features a short, stubby bill and distinctive white facial markings around the eyes. Its wings are short and pointed, and it has a short tail.

part_details.bill: Short, stubby, dark-colored with a slightly hooked tip.
part_details.plumage: Dark gray on the back and wings, with white underparts.
part_details.facial_markings: White patches around the eyes, contrasting with dark plumage.

spatial_relations: The white facial markings encircle the eyes.
The short bill is positioned at the front of the head.
The wings are attached to the sides of the body.
